title: Shaoxing, Zhejiang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Shaoxing, Zhejiang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Shaoxing is a city in Zhejiang with a population of 5,335,000. A historic water town in Zhejiang, famous for its rice wine, traditional canal-side architecture, and calligraphy culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
